component.name: Vajo: a Luet Package Manager Frontend
Luet Paket-Suche
Vajo: een frontend voor Luet Package Manager
Căutare pachete Luet
Vajo: інтерфейс менеджера пакетів Luet
Vajo：Luet 软件包管理器前端
component.summary: A graphical and terminal-based frontend for the Luet package manager

description.p: Vajo is a powerful yet simple package manager frontend for Luet, designed for MocaccinoOS. It provides both a graphical (GTK) and a terminal (ncurses) interface to manage your system.

ul.li: Search for packages in Luet repositories and Flathub
Perform full system upgrades and rollbacks
